configurePresets.name: default
configurePresets.description: Base: fetches all dependencies (Windows-CalcStandards, OpticalMeasurementParser, THMXParser, Windows-CalcEngine, LibraryFEMTherm, googletest) from their declared remotes via FetchContent. Inherited by default-debug and default-release.

configurePresets.name: local
configurePresets.description: Development mode: build this project and its dependency graph from sibling working copies (../<Name>) when checked out, each falling back to its remote when absent. Sets LBNL_LOCAL_SIBLINGS, a cache flag that cascades into sub-builds so the whole tree resolves locally; `default` leaves it off so everything comes from remotes. Inherited by local-debug, local-release, and personal compiler presets.
